title: solanum luteum subsp. villosum
intro: Solanum luteum subsp. villosum, also known as the yellow nightshade or villosum nightshade, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The plant's medicinal properties also contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antioxidant. Solanum luteum subsp. villosum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in salves and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
